mapper.insert: INSERT INTO decision_signal_outcomes (signal_id, horizon, engine_version, eval_status, outcome, return_pct, entry_price, exit_price, actual_movement, direction_expected, unable_reason, evaluated_at, created_at) VALUES (#{signalId}, #{horizon}, #{engineVersion}, #{evalStatus}, #{outcome}, #{returnPct}, #{entryPrice}, #{exitPrice}, #{actualMovement}, #{directionExpected}, #{unableReason}, #{evaluatedAt}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM decision_signal_outcomes WHERE signal_id = #{signalId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT outcome, COUNT(*) as count, AVG(return_pct) as avg_return_pct, COUNT(CASE WHEN outcome = 'win' THEN 1 END) as win_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN outcome = 'loss' THEN 1 END) as loss_count FROM decision_signal_outcomes WHERE eval_status = 'completed' GROUP BY outcome
